subcodes.first_line: O blessed Leaf of the Tree of the Merciful! Though thou art three hundred leagues distant, yet in the hallowed soil of Shíráz lies thy native land [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه مبارکه شجره رحمانیه هر چند سیصد فرسنگ دوری ولی در خاک پاک شیراز موطن
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @praise and encouragement
